summary: Verified and tested the Evening Accountability Agent module. All functions working correctly: get_day_results() retrieves today's tasks, calculate_score() computes completion rate and latency, generate_accountability_text() produces SMS-formatted reports, generate_staged_review_text() lists new captured items, process_staged_response() handles user selections, and process_tomorrow_queue() creates tomorrow's tasks. Successfully tested with existing task database (6 tasks planned, 1 completed) and staged task capture.

test_results.accountability_report: ✓ Generated successfully - shows 1/6 tasks (17%) with proper formatting
test_results.staged_review: ✓ Working - shows 1 staged item with source context
test_results.tomorrow_queue: ✓ Working - created 3 tasks from multiline input

integration_points: Uses staging.get_pending_staged_tasks() to review new captures
SMS formatting optimized for readability with emojis and clear structure
considerations_for_other_drops: Morning briefing agent (D2.2) coordinates with evening accountability - morning locks priorities, evening reviews results
Staged task promotion requires domain/project selection - marked as 'promoted_pending' for manual browser review (SMS limitation)
Current SMS output may need chunking for long task lists (>5 incomplete items shown)
Test task was created and dismissed successfully, confirming full workflow
known_limitations: SMS interface cannot handle complex domain/project selection during staged task promotion
Tasks promoted via SMS default to pending manual review in browser interface
Long task lists are truncated to 5 items for SMS readability
